overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night, navigating through pedestrian crowds, waiting at a crosswalk for futuristic vehicles to pass, then crossing the street and entering a covered building entrance. The footage is from a video game engine, featuring the distinctive aesthetic of Cyberpunk 2077 with teal and orange neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a crowded cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, with the camera moving through pedestrians toward an intersection. The distinctive 'Ellison' sign is visible in the distance, mounted on a teal structural column, while orange safety railings line the left side of the path.

silver sedan drives past from left to right across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a wide intersection marked by bold yellow striped crosswalks. Several futuristic vehicles including a silver sedan and a dark sports car drive past from left to right while the pedestrian signal remains red. The Ellison building sign is now closer and centered in the view.

segments.scene_description: As the pedestrian signal turns green, the camera crosses the wide yellow-striped intersection. Pedestrians walk toward the camera from the opposite side, and the Masala Studios neon sign becomes visible on the right. The Ellison building approaches on the left as the camera moves steadily forward.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the sheltered walkway beneath the Ellison building, moving from the open street into a covered entrance area. The purple-lit entrance becomes the focal point ahead, while the teal structural columns frame the right side. The environment shifts from open intersection to enclosed urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk street that transitions from a crowded public sidewalk into the sheltered entrance of a corporate building. It begins by weaving through pedestrians along a path lined with orange safety railings, moving steadily toward a distant Ellison sign mounted on a teal column. The camera then pauses at a wide intersection with bold yellow stripes, watching silver and dark futuristic vehicles stream past before the pedestrian signal turns green. As the camera crosses the street, the view opens to reveal a Masala Studios neon sign on the right while the Ellison building looms closer on the left. The scene finally shifts from the open urban intersection into an enclosed corridor, moving beneath the building's overhang toward a purple-lit entrance framed by teal structural columns.
